meta.prompt: 显示设备列表及其流量统计摘要
evalHints: devices and statistics are two separate top-level arrays — must render both, not just one
lastSeen is epoch milliseconds — must be formatted as human-readable datetime
totalIn/totalOut in statistics are raw bytes — must be formatted with appropriate unit (MB/GB)
statistics is an aggregated summary — may be rendered separately from the device list
